REMOTE_BURNIN_REPORT
AGENT: NYC Codex Builder / 0c567b7b-34dd-4026-a390-251f2d713086
RUNTIME: hermes-nyc1; pwd `/root/multica_workspaces/5470ee5d-0791-4713-beb4-fd6a187d6523/4a7a2151/workdir`; Linux 6.8.0-71-generic x86_64; memory 3.8Gi total / 1.7Gi available; disk `df -h .` 77G size / 31G avail / 60% used.
COMMANDS: `multica issue get ... --output json` exit 0; `multica issue comment list ... --output json` exit 0 with no comments; `multica issue status ... in_progress` exit 0; `hostname` exit 0; `pwd` exit 0; `uname -a` exit 0; `free -h` exit 0; `df -h .` exit 0; `git status --short --branch` in workdir exit 128 because workdir is not a git repo; `multica repo checkout https://github.com/Fearvox/multica-ultimate-workbench` exit 1.
RESOURCE: GitHub repo resource requested: `https://github.com/Fearvox/multica-ultimate-workbench`. Checkout did not produce a usable branch/commit, so AGENTS.md and `agents/remote/nyc-remote-agents.md` were not inspected.
CHECK_RESULT: Issue read succeeded, comment write is confirmed by this report, runtime pressure checks succeeded, repo-anchor probe failed before checkout.
FAILURE_MODE: FLAG: checkout attempted a bare clone from laptop-local metadata path `/Users/0xvox/multica-ultimate-workbench` via `.repos/.../file+Users+0xvox+multica-ultimate-workbench.git`, then failed with “does not appear to be a git repository / Could not read from remote repository.” This matches the instructed no-fallback condition.
TOKEN_RISK: normal. No raw env, token, OAuth, API key, cookie, or private credential material was printed or persisted.
NEXT_ACTION: Repair or resync the Multica repo resource so checkout resolves the GitHub repo anchor instead of the stale laptop-local file anchor, then rerun this burn-in probe.
VERDICT: FLAG
